speaker: Assistant
en: Hello, this is Preston Community Centre.

speaker: Man
en: Oh, hello.

speaker: Man
en: My name's Andrew Shepherd.

speaker: Man
en: I'm ringing about the classes you offer.

speaker: Assistant
en: OK, Mr. Shepherd.

speaker: Assistant
en: Are there any classes in particular that you're interested in?

speaker: Man
en: Yes, you've got a class called Photography, I believe?

speaker: Assistant
en: That's right.

speaker: Assistant
en: It's the first time we offer this class because many people enquired about it last term.

speaker: Assistant
en: It'll be held in a library not far from our community centre.

speaker: Man
en: Right.

speaker: Man
en: I know it's on the weekend, right?

speaker: Assistant
en: Yes, it's on Saturday, and it will occupy the whole morning.

speaker: Man
en: OK.

speaker: Man
en: Um, what do I need to bring?

speaker: Assistant
en: Obviously, you have to bring your own camera.

speaker: Assistant
en: Some people bring a lot of accessories like an extra lens, but there's really no need for this class.

speaker: Assistant
en: It's mainly focusing on composition really, and getting the most out of the basic camera.

speaker: Man
en: That's exactly what I want.

speaker: Man
en: OK, then I've heard there's a class on cooking, right?

speaker: Assistant
en: Yes, it's called French cooking class.

speaker: Assistant
en: As the name suggests, it will teach you cooking skills in French cuisine.

speaker: Man
en: Oh, great.

speaker: Man
en: Where will that be held?

speaker: Assistant
en: This class is special, so we arrange it in a kitchen where we can get the necessary cooking equipment.

speaker: Assistant
en: Let me see, yes, the Anita Kitchen.

speaker: Assistant
en: As for the time of the course, it used to be on the second Tuesday of every month, but there's a small adjustment this time.

speaker: Assistant
en: Although it's still held on a monthly basis, the exact time will be changed to the first Tuesday.

speaker: Man
en: Well, actually it's my wife who's really interested, and I think it's a good fit for her because our daughter has to take a guitar lesson every Tuesday, so my wife is available.

speaker: Assistant
en: That's good.

speaker: Assistant
en: But I have to remind you that aprons are not provided in this class, so when you do come, please bring one with you in case you get dirty when cooking.

speaker: Assistant
en: What's more, don't forget to bring some money with you, as the ingredients for cooking, like vegetables or meat, have to be paid by yourself.

speaker: Man
en: OK, useful information to know.

speaker: Man
en: Then there's another class that my wife would like to join – that's the Beading class.

speaker: Assistant
en: Oh, I've taken the class myself.

speaker: Assistant
en: The tutor is excellent.

speaker: Assistant
en: Last term it was held in a tennis club, which is going to be redecorated soon, so we plan to change this class to a golf club this time.

speaker: Assistant
en: And it'll be held on the evening of every Wednesday.

speaker: Man
en: Do I have to bring the beads with me?

speaker: Assistant
en: Yes, that's the only material needed for this class.

speaker: Man
en: OK, I think this class is also a good choice for her.

speaker: Man
en: Um, do you have any other classes that I can join?

speaker: Assistant
en: If you like, I think you can take our Painting class.

speaker: Assistant
en: It's a popular class, so this term we're going to move it to a high school so that we get more room.

speaker: Man
en: What time will it be?

speaker: Assistant
en: It'll be on every Monday evening.

speaker: Man
en: The time is good for me.

speaker: Man
en: Do I have to bring the paints?

speaker: Assistant
en: Well, paints will be provided by the tutor, I know that.

speaker: Assistant
en: Um, the information says you'll just need some brushes.

speaker: Man
en: I see.

speaker: Man
en: OK, just another question about the Beading class.

speaker: Man
en: I've just remembered my wife asked me to find out the exact time – when will the first class begin?

speaker: Assistant
en: Well, the deadline for registration is April 30th, and we are not going to start the class until May 15th.

speaker: Man
en: OK.

speaker: Man
en: What's the fee for this class?

speaker: Assistant
en: It was 95 dollars last term, but the cost will be a little more this term.

speaker: Assistant
en: Well, let me check the details.

speaker: Assistant
en: OK, it'll be 100 dollars this term, just 5 dollars more.

speaker: Man
en: Sounds reasonable.

speaker: Man
en: Then about the location.

speaker: Man
en: It's in the club, which room exactly?

speaker: Assistant
en: Room J52.

speaker: Man
en: OK, just one more question.

speaker: Man
en: Is parking convenient?

speaker: Assistant
en: I'm sorry to tell you that parking space is only available for the club's premier members.

speaker: Assistant
en: But if you drive, there's a parking lot opposite the club, just beside the station.

speaker: Assistant
en: You need to pay only a small parking fee.

speaker: Man
en: OK.

speaker: Man
en: That's all I want to know.

speaker: Man
en: I'll call you later after I discuss it with my wife.

speaker: Man
en: Thank you very much.

speaker: Assistant
en: You're welcome.

speaker: Assistant
en: Bye!

speaker: Man
en: Bye!
